entries.rules: requires 2 wood in inventory; must be adjacent to grass or path tile; agent must face the tile where the table is placed
must have crafting table; must be adjacent to the crafting table; use MAKE_WOOD_PICKAXE action
when adjacent to a tree and facing it, use DO action to gather wood; no tool required
to gather stone: must be adjacent to stone block and facing it; requires a pickaxe (wooden or stone) equipped in inventory
requires 1 wood in inventory and must be adjacent to the crafting table at (28,33), facing it
requires wood_pickaxe equipped; must be adjacent to stone block and facing it; success adds one stone to inventory
requires crafting table to be placed and agent adjacent to it; no flint required
requires crafting table to be placed and agent adjacent to it; requires at least 1 wood and 1 stone in inventory; no flint required
requires 2 wood in inventory; must be adjacent to grass or path tile
requires stone pickaxe equipped; must be adjacent to coal block; facing it; successful mining adds one coal to inventory
move to coal block at [28,33]; face it; use DO action with stone pickaxe
requires wooden or stone pickaxe equipped; must be adjacent to iron block and facing it
requires agent to be adjacent to grass or path tile; must stand next to the tile and face it during placement; requires at least 8 stone and 1 coal in inventory
agent must be adjacent to an unoccupied grass or path tile; must face the tile; requires at least 8 stone and 1 coal in inventory
